title: alchemilla vulgaris subsp. micans
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris subsp. micans, also known as the smooth lady's mantle, is a subspecies of the Alchemilla plant, characterized by its smooth leaves and stems. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris subsp. micans include its ability to reduce menstrual cramps and heavy bleeding, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is also used in ointments and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
